2184560.name: deadHex
2184560.description:
deadHex is a head-to-head tactical FPS meets MOBA, where every shot counts and every build tells a story. Battle to destroy your opponent’s HQ in a game of precision, strategy, and brutal efficiency.

Explore the world of the Hamlet.

Battle across different maps and themes as you cement your legacy as a Hexor.

Play the way you want to play.

Each match is a 1v1 duel where you'll draft your build from hundreds of combinations—balancing movement, firepower, durability, and Hex power. Whether you're a sharpshooter or a juggernaut, you decide how you win.

Wield powerful artifacts to shake up the battlefield.

Merchants from far and wide come to provide their wares. Harness the power of ancient artifacts that grant special abilities to dominate the battlefield.

Hire mercenaries to wreak havoc on your opponents.

Send in mercenaries—elite units or overwhelming swarms—to push the map and pressure enemy defenses. Timing and gold investment matter: a smart mercenary play can end the game before the next firefight even starts.
2184560.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
